message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Oauth" as Oauth
participant "Login Endpoint" as LoginEndpoint
participant "Consent Endpoint" as ConsentEndpoint

== Open page ==

Client -> Oauth : Initiate authorize code or implicit flow
Oauth --> Client : No user session (not authenticated)
Client -> LoginEndpoint : Redirect to login endpoint with <login_challenge>
note right : GET https://<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>/login?login_challenge=7bb518c4eec2454dbb289f5fdb4c0ee2

== Login ==

Client -> LoginEndpoint : Input user/password
LoginEndpoint -> LoginEndpoint : Verify user/password
LoginEndpoint -> Oauth : Fetch login request info with <login_challenge>
note right : GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login?login_challenge=<challenge>

LoginEndpoint -> Oauth : Accept login
note right
PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login/accept?login_challenge=<challenge>
{
  "acr": "string",
  "context": {},
  "force_subject_identifier": "string",
  "remember": true,
  "remember_for": 3600,
  "subject": "string"
}
end note

LoginEndpoint --> LoginEndpoint : Return redirect url
LoginEndpoint --> Client : Redirect

== Consent ==

Client --> Client : First time that client asks user for permission
Client -> ConsentEndpoint : Redirect with <consent_challenge>
ConsentEndpoint --> ConsentEndpoint : Asking users permission to grant application access
ConsentEndpoint -> Oauth : Fetch consent info
note right : GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent?consent_challenge=<challenge>

ConsentEndpoint -> Oauth : Accept
note right
PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent/accept?consent_challenge=<challenge>
{
  "grant_scope": ["openid", "offline_access"],
  "handled_at": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  "session": {
    "access_token": {
      "foo": "This field will be available when introspecting the Access Token"
    },
    "id_token": {
      "bar": "This field will be available as a claim in the ID Token"
      }
    }
}
end note

ConsentEndpoint --> ConsentEndpoint : Return redirect url
ConsentEndpoint --> Client : Redirect page

@enduml
```
